content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Red and Blue". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1469/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains two integers n and k. The second line contains n integers a1, a2, ..., an.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the maximum number of red balls that can be painted blue.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the array and then paint the k smallest balls blue

code.Python3:
import sys
for _ in range(int(input())):
    n, k = map(int, input().split())
    arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
    arr.sort()
    print(k)
